name: Orchestration Demo
description: Bookkeeping tools (artifacts, wallet, phase announcements) for the orchestration demo. Posts events to demo-display so the audience-facing dashboard updates in real time.

displayUrl.description: Base URL of the demo-display server. Default http://127.0.0.1:7777.

walletInitialBalanceUsd.description: Initial wallet balance the agent sees on demo_wallet_balance. Default 10000.
